name: Chocolate Tofu Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nonfat sour cream or yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Coat a 10-inch glass pie plate with vegetable cooking spray.
In a bowl, combine tofu, cheese, cream cheese, maple sugar, cocoa powder, egg whites, cinnamon, Irish cream liqueur, and Kahlua coffee liqueur. Puree until smooth and pour into the prepared pie plate.
Place the pie plate in the center rack of the oven.
On the bottom rack, place a baking pan filled halfway with water.
Bake for 1 hour.
Combine topping ingredients in a small bowl and whisk thoroughly.
When the cake has baked for an hour, remove it from the oven and spread the topping evenly.
Decorate by drizzling a mixture of maple syrup and unsweetened cocoa on top of the topping.
Return the cake to the oven and bake until the topping sets (10-30 minutes).
Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
